steps: Go to https://app.snipcart.com and log in or create a free account
In the dashboard, click your account name or navigate to Account > Credentials
Under 'Secret API Keys', click 'Create a new API Key'
Choose whether the key should be for Test or Live mode
Copy the generated secret API key
The API uses HTTP Basic auth: encode the key as base64(apiKey:) — use the key as username with an empty password

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: Secret API Key
credential_fields.description: Your Snipcart secret API key. Used with HTTP Basic auth (key as username, empty password).

notes: Free trial available; pricing is a percentage of sales (2% or $10/month, whichever is higher)
Separate keys exist for Test mode and Live mode
Also has a Public API Key (for frontend use) — the secret key is for server-side API access only
The secret API key gives full access to all account data — keep it secure
Multiple secret keys can be created for different integrations

test_endpoint.description: List orders in your Snipcart account
